subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Render thanks unto God that thou hast become the recipient of His boundless favours and art confirmed in service at His Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان شکر کن خدا را که مورد الطاف بی پایان گشتی و موید بخدمت آستان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation
